title: Package Version & Stability Tools

classes.name: VersionParser
properties: private static $constraints: array<string, ConstraintInterface>  // parse cache
methods: public static isUpgrade(string $normalizedFrom, string $normalizedTo): bool  // uses Semver::sort

classes.name: VersionSelector
methods: private transformVersion(string $version, string $prettyVersion, string $stability): string  // builds ^x.y constraint

classes.name: VersionGuesser
classes.phpstan_type: Version = array{version: string, commit: string|null, pretty_version: string|null, feature_version?: string|null, feature_pretty_version?: string|null}
methods: public getRootVersionFromEnv(): string  // reads COMPOSER_ROOT_VERSION env var
private guessFeatureVersion(array $packageConfig, ?string $version, array $branches, array $scmCmdline, string $path): array  // async branch diffing
private postprocess(array $versionData): array  // normalises 9999999 dev aliases

classes.name: VersionBumper
methods: public bumpRequirement(ConstraintInterface $constraint, PackageInterface $package): string  // bumps lower bound of ^/~/>=/* constraints to installed version

classes.name: StabilityFilter
methods: public static isPackageAcceptable(array $acceptableStabilities, array $stabilityFlags, array $names, string $stability): bool  // checks per-package flags then global stability

classes.name: Link
methods: public getPrettyConstraint(): string  // throws if null

key_relationships: VersionParser extends Composer\Semver\VersionParser (SemverVersionParser) — overrides parseConstraints with caching; adds parseNameVersionPairs, isUpgrade
VersionSelector depends_on VersionParser — lazy-creates via getParser(); uses parseConstraints()
VersionSelector depends_on PlatformRepository — reads platform packages in constructor
VersionSelector depends_on Link — reads Link::getConstraint(), getTarget(), getDescription(), getPrettyConstraint() when filtering platform requirements
VersionSelector depends_on ArrayLoader + ArrayDumper — for branch-alias resolution in findRecommendedRequireVersion()
VersionGuesser depends_on SemverVersionParser — calls normalizeBranch(), normalize()
VersionGuesser depends_on ProcessExecutor — runs git/hg/fossil/svn subprocesses
VersionGuesser depends_on Config — passed to HgDriver
VersionGuesser references VersionParser::DEFAULT_BRANCH_ALIAS — for Hg version check
VersionBumper depends_on VersionParser — instantiates locally for parseConstraints()
VersionBumper depends_on PackageInterface — reads getVersion(), isDev()
VersionBumper depends_on ArrayLoader + ArrayDumper — for branch-alias resolution
StabilityFilter depends_on BasePackage::STABILITIES — constant map for stability priority
Link depends_on ConstraintInterface — holds and exposes it via getConstraint()
external_dependencies: Composer\Package\BasePackage — STABILITIES constant used by StabilityFilter & VersionSelector
Composer\Util\ProcessExecutor — VCS subprocess runner in VersionGuesser
Composer\Util\Git, Svn — env cleaning + command helpers in VersionGuesser
Composer\Repository\Vcs\HgDriver — branch listing for Hg in VersionGuesser
Composer\Filter\PlatformRequirementFilter\* — platform filter hierarchy used in VersionSelector
important_notes: VersionParser caches all parseConstraints() results in a static array — shared across all instances.
VersionParser::DEFAULT_BRANCH_ALIAS ('9999999-dev') is referenced by VersionSelector, VersionGuesser, and VersionBumper.
VersionSelector::findBestCandidate sorts candidates by stability priority then version_compare; filters on platform constraints.
VersionSelector::findRecommendedRequireVersion returns '*' for ext-* packages synced with PHP version.
VersionGuesser::guessVersion tries VCS backends in order: Git → Hg → Fossil → SVN; all use postprocess() for pretty version normalization.
VersionGuesser::guessFeatureVersion runs async SCM diff commands (up to 30 parallel jobs) to find nearest non-feature branch.
VersionBumper::bumpRequirement handles ^, ~, >=, * and 2.* wildcard patterns; uses Intervals to check if new constraint equals old.
StabilityFilter::isPackageAcceptable is a static utility — no state, pure logic over STABILITIES map.
Link stores a directional dependency (source → target) with a ConstraintInterface and a description constant from TYPE_* values.
